headline: Trump 😎🍊: Iran Ayatollah Cucks 🤡 Begging for DEAL 💸 Before ARMADA 🍆🚢 MOONS 'Em! 💥
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 👨‍💼🍊 dropping BOMBS 💣📢 at White House 🏛️: 'Iran PERSIAN PUSSYCATS 🐱😻 WANNA DEAL HARDER 💦📝 than face Uncle Sam's FREEDOM FLEET 🚢🦅 pounding Gulf like a Baywatch remix 🏖️💨!' Tehran SIMPS 🤡 say MISSILES 🚀🛡️ 'NEVER NEVER' on table 🍽️ but FM Abbas Araghchi 😷 begging for 'MUTUAL RESPECT 👫✨' – yeah right, like Kim Jong-Un respects denuke vibes! 😂🔥 Trump warned TIME'S RUNNING OUT ⏳💀 on NUCLEAR GLOW-UP ☢️🤖 after MASSIVE NAVAL ARMADA 🛥️🍆 'FLOATING NEAR IRAN 🏝️ cuz why not? They gotta park SOMEPWHERE! 🚀😏'

Putin 🐻🇷🇺 getting COZY 🤝 with Iran's Supreme Security Daddy Ali Larijani 👨‍💼 at Kremlin tea party ☕: 'Middle East DRAMA 👯‍♂️🌍 and global tea-spilling!' Ria-Novosti spilling deets 📰💦 while Iran SWEARING nuclear program's 'PEACEFUL AS A LAMB 🐑😇' – suuuure, like their MISSILE PARTIES are just fireworks 🎆😂! Trump GOATED 🐐: 'No NUKES ☢️🚫, STOP SLAUGHTERING PROTESTORS 🔪😢 or BOOM 💥 incoming!' HRANA spilling BLOOD TEA 🩸☕: 6,300+ DEAD 😵💀 including 5,900+ ragers, IHR yelling 25K+ TOLL 🤯📈 – internet BLACKOUT 🚫🌐 hiding MORE BODIES! 🪦

Trump's WEDNESDAY ULTIMATUM ⚡📜 after vowing 'HELP ON THE WAY 🦸‍♂️🚀' for protest GOATs crushed in brutal crackdown – executions PAUSED? 😲 'We'll SEE what happens 👀' if no deal, but MOMMY USA 🇺🇸 got that ARMADA THROBBING ⬆️ near Tehran like Elon’s Starship test 😂🚀! Araghchi at Istanbul powwow 🤝🇹🇷 with Turks: 'FAIR TALKS or BUST 💥' – but Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔🇺🇸, Persians gotta CHOKE on no-nuke pill 💊😤!' No DEADLINE deets, 'ONLY THEY KNOW 👻' – classic Art of the Deal MAGIC 🪄💰! Iran sweating 😰💦 missile bans 🚫🚀 while Trump flexes 'We'll MAKE A DEAL or FLOAT BOATS TILL THEY BEG 🛥️🙏!' Wall Street simps 🤡 watching if this Gulf ORGY 💦🌊 pops the oil bubble 🫧🛢️ – JENNINGS? Nah, this is TRUMP'S PERSIAN PUSSY WHIP 🐱⛓️! 😂🔥‼️
